'''Carosi''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Carosus system]]. In [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]] the five innermost [[Planet/Legends|planets]] were destroyed when it expanded into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]].

{{Star-stub}}
